languages.text: "Ваше доверие ко мне уже пошатнулось — вы сами поняли, что со мной что-то не так. Если я не расскажу вам правду, оно будет утеряно безвозвратно. Вариант, в котором я рассказываю вам все, — единственный, где есть шанс на восстановление дружественных отношений".

"Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."
languages.original_text: "Ваше доверие ко мне уже пошатнулось — вы сами поняли, что со мной что-то не так. Если я не расскажу вам правду, оно будет утеряно безвозвратно. Вариант, в котором я рассказываю вам все, — единственный, где есть шанс на восстановление дружественных отношений".

The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

"Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

"Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

languages.text: «Su confianza en mí se ha visto mermada. Ha deducido por cuenta propia que había algo en mí que no encajaba. Si no le digo la verdad, esa confianza quedará rota irreversiblemente. La única situación en la que podemos reconstruir nuestra relación pasa por revelárselo todo».
languages.original_text: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

traits.locale_text: «Su confianza en mí se ha visto mermada. Ha deducido por cuenta propia que había algo en mí que no encajaba. Si no le digo la verdad, esa confianza quedará rota irreversiblemente. La única situación en la que podemos reconstruir nuestra relación pasa por revelárselo todo».

languages.text: “您对我的信任已经动摇了——您自己也察觉出我有些不对劲。如果我不告诉您真相，那这份信任就彻底无可挽回了。向您坦白，是让我们重新修好的唯一机会。”
languages.original_text: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

traits.locale_text: “您对我的信任已经动摇了——您自己也察觉出我有些不对劲。如果我不告诉您真相，那这份信任就彻底无可挽回了。向您坦白，是让我们重新修好的唯一机会。”

languages.text: « La confiance que vous m'accordez a déjà été ébranlée, puisque vous avez compris vous-même que mon comportement était anormal. Si je continuais à vous cacher la vérité, cette confiance serait irrémédiablement perdue. Le seul scénario qui m'offre une chance de rester en bons termes avec vous est celui dans lequel je vous explique tout. »
languages.original_text: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

traits.locale_text: « La confiance que vous m'accordez a déjà été ébranlée, puisque vous avez compris vous-même que mon comportement était anormal. Si je continuais à vous cacher la vérité, cette confiance serait irrémédiablement perdue. Le seul scénario qui m'offre une chance de rester en bons termes avec vous est celui dans lequel je vous explique tout. »

languages.text: "Bana olan güveniniz çoktan sarsıldı. Bende bir sorun olduğunu kendi başınıza anladınız. Size gerçeği söylemezsem geri dönülmez bir şekilde kaybolup gidecek. Her şeyi anlattığım senaryo, yeniden iyi geçinme şansımızın olduğu tek senaryo."
languages.original_text: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

traits.locale_text: "Bana olan güveniniz çoktan sarsıldı. Bende bir sorun olduğunu kendi başınıza anladınız. Size gerçeği söylemezsem geri dönülmez bir şekilde kaybolup gidecek. Her şeyi anlattığım senaryo, yeniden iyi geçinme şansımızın olduğu tek senaryo."

languages.text: "Euer Vertrauen in mich wurde bereits erschüttert ... Ihr habt selbst herausgefunden, dass mit mir etwas nicht stimmt. Wenn ich Euch nicht die Wahrheit sage, geht sie unwiederbringlich verloren. Das Szenario, in dem ich Euch alles erzähle, ist das einzige, das eine Chance birgt, unsere Beziehung wieder zu verbessern."
languages.original_text: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."

traits.locale_text: "Euer Vertrauen in mich wurde bereits erschüttert ... Ihr habt selbst herausgefunden, dass mit mir etwas nicht stimmt. Wenn ich Euch nicht die Wahrheit sage, geht sie unwiederbringlich verloren. Das Szenario, in dem ich Euch alles erzähle, ist das einzige, das eine Chance birgt, unsere Beziehung wieder zu verbessern."

languages.text: 「私に対する信頼はすでに揺らいでいる。もし私が真実を話さなければ、その信頼は取り返しのつかないほど失われてしまう。私があなたにすべてを話すというシナリオが、私たちが再び良好な関係に戻れる唯一の可能性なのです」。
languages.original_text: "Your trust in me has already been shaken — you worked out on your own that there was something amiss with me. If I do not tell you the truth, then it will be irretrievably lost. The scenario in which I tell you everything is the only one where there is a chance of us being on good terms once more."
